title: TCI Express is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: TCI Express is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the TCI Express family as a Warehouse Manager in Allahabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TCI Express:
TCI Express is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TCI Express!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
